compose_diagnostics.page_title: Jackson Hinkle 🇺🇸 on X: "🚨BREAKING: Pope Leo XIV says no one can use Jesus, the "King of Peace," to justify war. https://t.co/WKrGWOT7rE" / X
compose_diagnostics.compose_text_preview: A quick check on papal history shows there's no Pope Leo XIV. This claim seems to be entirely fabricated. It highlights the constant need for verifiable evidence, especially when discussing significant figures or events. What does this narrative serve?
